summary: Mapped the current stack and all relevant seams. Nutrition is eight mutable per-serving recipe columns plus an explicit audited AI estimate path; there are no canonical nutrients/foods, source/reference/goal models, allocations, intake records, snapshots, charts, or true private authorization. Planner servings are integer household totals, cook completion is not consumption, and Pantry schema/domain work began concurrently during the Scout. Current lint, types, and 80 unit/integration tests pass; repository-wide format:check is pre-existing red. The safest first slice is a new-file pure Nutrition calculation kernel while Pantry-owned schema changes stabilize.
facts: Existing profiles are explicitly convenience/attribution and not authorization.
Current recipe nutrition is eight nullable per-serving values without durable source/confidence/completeness metadata.
Recipe ingredients are free-form; no tracked canonical ingredient or nutrient record exists.
Meal plans have integer household servings and no per-person allocation or status.
Cook sessions record completion only and do not create prepared or consumed snapshots.
Pantry 0015/schema/domain files appeared during the Scout and are externally owned in-progress work.
No charting library or offline mutation/sync layer exists.
Lint, typecheck, 50 unit tests, and 30 integration tests pass at this snapshot.
Repository-wide format:check fails on 88 files before Nutrition implementation.
contradictions: The brief requires server-private adult diaries, but the current signed profile cookie is deliberately not an authorization boundary.
The brief assumes integrated Pantry nutrition, while Pantry implementation is currently concurrent and incomplete.
The release oracle requires a clean format gate, but the current repository-wide format check is already red.
ambiguity_requiring_judge: Approve a true local Nutrition credential/session and permission design rather than keying privacy to switchable profiles.
Choose the canonical food identity after the Pantry schema stabilizes.
Define legacy backfill provenance for the eight existing recipe fields.
Choose an accessible chart implementation without an existing chart library.
Protect concurrent Pantry and recipe-reaction changes with non-overlapping first-slice files.
commands: rg --files and targeted rg/Get-Content repository inspection
git status --short and git diff ownership inspection
